title: Manage Stake #{{neuronId}}

increaseStake.title: Increase Stake
increaseStake.maxButtonAriaLabel: Set amount to maximum available balance
increaseStake.currentAndAvailable: Current: {{current}} ICP • Available: {{available}} ICP ({{fee}} ICP fee applies)
increaseStake.info: Adding ICP to your Stake increases your voting power and potential rewards. The added amount will be locked for the same dissolve delay period.
increaseStake.success: Successfully added {{amount}} ICP to your Stake.

errors.failed: Failed to increase Stake. Please try again.

increaseDelay.title: Dissolve delay
increaseDelay.warning: The dissolve delay can only be increased, never decreased.
increaseDelay.alreadyMax: Your Stake is already at maximum dissolve delay.

errors.failed: Failed to increase dissolve delay. Please try again.

maturityMode.title: New maturity
maturityMode.infoAutoStake: Auto-stake: rewards automatically increase your Stake for compound growth.
maturityMode.infoKeepLiquid: Keep Liquid: don't auto-stake rewards, keep them available for withdrawal.
maturityMode.noChange: Maturity mode is already set to this option.

errors.failed: Failed to update maturity mode. Please try again.

dissolve.warningStart: Important: Starting the dissolve process will begin the countdown. After the delay period ends, you can withdraw your ICP. You can stop dissolving and re-lock the Stake at any time. Note: starting to dissolve will reset any accumulated age bonus.
dissolve.warningStop: Important: Stopping the dissolve process will re-lock your Stake and pause the countdown. The dissolve delay can still be increased at any time.
dissolve.successStart: Dissolving started. Your Stake will be available after the dissolve delay.
dissolve.successStop: Dissolving stopped. Your Stake is now locked.

errors.failed: Failed to update dissolve state. Please try again.

disburseIcp.title: Disburse Stake
disburseIcp.info: Disburse {{amount}} ICP. They will be returned to your available balance, and can be restaked at any time after disbursement.
disburseIcp.success: Stake has been disbursed. ICP returned to your balance.

errors.failed: Failed to disburse Stake. Please try again.

disburseMaturity.title: Disburse Maturity
disburseMaturity.info: Disbursement takes 1 week. {{amount}} maturity will be converted to ICP and added to your balance.
disburseMaturity.success: Maturity disbursement started. ICP will be added to your balance in approximately 1 week.

errors.failed: Failed to disburse maturity. Please try again.

confirmNavigation: An action is in progress. Leaving this page may cause unexpected results. Are you sure you want to leave?
